index.expertiseSlabBlock1Lead: One owner from design to long-term run—BOQ, commissioning, and named contacts for operations, audits, and on-call when it matters.
index.expertiseSlabBlock1Point1: Milestones your teams can sign off before we build or spend.
index.expertiseSlabBlock1Point2: As-builts and runbooks your ops can trace and audit.
index.expertiseSlabBlock1Point3: SLA support and escalation when unplanned downtime is not an option.
index.expertiseSlabBlock2Lead: Sensitive and large sites where ATEX, EN54, and local codes govern what we design, integrate, and hand over.
index.expertiseSlabBlock2Point1: Norms, building and safety interfaces, and evidence for inspections.
index.expertiseSlabBlock2Point2: Casablanca base; project delivery in Morocco and the region.
index.expertiseSlabBlock2Point3: Test traceability, upgrades, and evolutions you can file and sign off.
index.notreApprocheText: One delivery model: clear milestones, documented handover, and named contacts after go-live.
index.processKickerText: One technical owner from diagnosis to on-call—milestones you can track, documentation you can audit.
index.processStep1Focus: What your teams sign off before we build.
index.processStep2Focus: Standards, BOQ, and architecture—no blind spots.
index.processStep3Focus: Commissioning and handover so ops can run day-to-day.
index.processStep4Focus: On-call coverage and evolution when downtime is not an option.
index.approachStep1Desc: Site walkthrough, constraints, risks, and a scope your teams can sign off on.
index.approachStep2Desc: Architecture, BOQ, and standards mapping—ATEX / EN54 where the site demands it.
index.approachStep3Desc: Install, commission, train, and document so operations can run without us in the room.
index.approachStep4Desc: SLA-backed maintenance and on-call coverage for sites that do not get a second chance at downtime.
index.whyChooseUsDesc: Engineers who stay through handover—so your runbooks match the field, not a slide deck.
index.whyBlock1Text: Integrated platforms and documentation mean fewer handoffs when something breaks at 2 a.m.
index.whyBlock2Text: Certified on the brands we deploy—not generic integrators learning on your production network.
index.whyBlock3Text: Named escalation paths and SLA options for plants and campuses that cannot wait in a ticket queue.
index.whyBlock4Text: Solutions engineered for ATEX, EN54, and your internal policies—documented from day one.
index.processStep2Desc: Engineering, deployment, training, and handover—with traceability for hazardous and regulated sites.
index.pourquoi2: Partnerships with reference brands (Synergates, Dahua, Axis, Huawei, Cisco, Honeywell…)
index.pourquoi3: Responsiveness and proximity thanks to a dedicated team
index.pourquoi4: Evolving solutions compliant with standards (ATEX, EN54)

index.introP1: TechSec Solutions provides enterprise-grade technology and security infrastructure. With over a decade of expertise, we deliver solutions that help organizations achieve operational excellence, enhance security, and drive digital transformation.
index.introP2: Our team of certified engineers and security specialists works with Fortune 500 companies, government agencies, and growing businesses to design, implement, and maintain mission-critical systems.
index.techSolutionsDesc: Video surveillance Casablanca, enterprise access control and technology infrastructures Morocco.
index.enterpriseSecurityDesc: Multi-layered security architecture protecting your digital infrastructure, data assets, and physical facilities with advanced threat detection and response capabilities.
index.networkInfrastructureDesc: Scalable, high-performance network solutions engineered for reliability, security, and seamless connectivity across distributed enterprise environments.
index.cloudSolutionsDesc: Secure, scalable cloud infrastructure and hybrid solutions enabling digital transformation, remote collaboration, and business continuity.
index.surveillanceMonitoringDesc: Intelligent surveillance systems with AI-powered analytics, real-time monitoring, and comprehensive coverage for enhanced security and operational insights.
index.aiAnalyticsDesc: Advanced analytics and machine learning solutions that transform data into actionable intelligence, driving informed decision-making and predictive insights.
index.managedServicesDesc: Comprehensive managed services including 24/7 monitoring, proactive maintenance, and expert support ensuring optimal system performance and reliability.
index.industriesDesc: Specialized solutions tailored to the unique requirements and compliance standards of your industry
index.provenExcellenceDesc: Industry-recognized certifications and awards, with a track record of delivering mission-critical solutions for Fortune 500 companies.
index.expertTeamDesc: Certified engineers, security specialists, and technology consultants with deep industry expertise and continuous training on latest technologies.
index.enterpriseSecurityCardDesc: Multi-layered security architecture with compliance frameworks (industry best practices) ensuring your data and infrastructure remain protected.
index.support24Desc: Round-the-clock monitoring, proactive maintenance, and rapid response support ensuring maximum uptime and system reliability.

solutions.title: Solutions by Scenario
solutions.subtitle: Focused on each business process
solutions.intro: Each industry consists of a finite number of scenarios. We believe that the key to the success of an entire solution is its ability to meet the requirements and challenges in each scenario. That's why we keep digging into the basic needs and untapped demands scenario by scenario, and direct our best engineering to offer dedicated solutions there.

about.heroSubtitle: Since our founding, we have been supporting Moroccan and African businesses in their digital transformation and securing their infrastructures.
about.story1: SYNERGATES is a technology solutions integrator based in Casablanca. Founded by passionate engineers, our company was built on solid technical expertise and in-depth knowledge of local needs.
about.story2: We design, install and maintain video surveillance, access control, intrusion alarm and network infrastructure systems for clients in the industrial, tertiary, hospitality and petroleum sectors.
about.story3: Our approach is distinguished by personalized support: from the initial study to maintenance, we remain at your side to guarantee the performance of your installations.
about.missionText: To provide reliable technology solutions tailored to the specific needs of each client, while ensuring proximity service and responsive technical support.
about.valueProximityDesc: A dedicated contact and an available team to respond to your needs quickly.
about.valueExpertiseDesc: Trained and certified technicians on equipment from the world's leading brands.
about.valueQualityDesc: Brand equipment and installations that comply with current standards.
about.expertiseSubtitle: Complete solutions to secure and modernize your infrastructures
about.expertise1Desc: IP cameras, recorders, video analytics and centralized supervision.
about.expertise2Desc: Badges, biometrics, turnstiles and visitor management.
about.expertise3Desc: Perimeter detection, alarm panels and remote monitoring.
about.expertise4Desc: Structured cabling, switches, WiFi and fiber optic.
about.expertise5Desc: Automatic barriers, license plate recognition and ticketing.
about.expertise6Desc: Automation, building management and energy efficiency.

about.title: About TechSec Solutions
about.subtitle: Empowering organizations worldwide with enterprise-grade technology and security solutions built on trust, expertise, and commitment to excellence
about.overviewP1: TechSec Solutions is a premier provider of enterprise-grade technology and security infrastructure solutions. Since our founding in 2014, we have established ourselves as a trusted partner to organizations across diverse industries, from Fortune 500 corporations to government agencies and growing businesses.
about.overviewP2: Our team of certified engineers, security specialists, and technology consultants brings decades of combined experience in designing, implementing, and maintaining mission-critical systems. We understand that every organization has unique challenges, and we pride ourselves on delivering customized solutions that align perfectly with our clients' business objectives.
about.overviewP3: With a proven track record of successful implementations and a commitment to continuous innovation, TechSec Solutions stands at the forefront of the technology solutions industry, helping organizations protect their assets, optimize operations, and achieve their strategic goals.
about.missionP1: To empower organizations with cutting-edge technology and security solutions that protect their assets, enhance operational efficiency, and enable sustainable growth. We are committed to delivering exceptional value through innovative solutions, expert implementation, and unwavering support.
about.missionP2: Our mission extends beyond technology deployment—we strive to build lasting partnerships that help our clients navigate the complexities of modern business while maintaining the highest standards of security and reliability.
about.visionP1: To be the most trusted and innovative technology solutions provider globally, recognized for our expertise, integrity, and commitment to client success. We envision a future where every organization has access to enterprise-grade technology that drives innovation and protects what matters most.
about.visionP2: Through continuous innovation, strategic partnerships, and a culture of excellence, we aim to shape the future of enterprise technology and security, setting new standards for quality, reliability, and customer satisfaction.
about.coreValuesDesc: Our core values guide every decision, every project, and every interaction, ensuring we deliver exceptional results while maintaining the highest standards of integrity and professionalism
about.securityFirstDesc: Protecting your assets, data, and operations is our fundamental commitment. Every solution is designed with security as the cornerstone, ensuring comprehensive protection at every layer.
about.innovationDesc: We embrace emerging technologies and innovative approaches, continuously evolving our solutions to stay ahead of industry trends and deliver cutting-edge capabilities.
about.partnershipDesc: We build lasting relationships based on trust, transparency, and mutual respect. Our clients are partners, and their success is our success.
about.excellenceDesc: We maintain uncompromising standards of quality, professionalism, and expertise in every project, ensuring exceptional outcomes that exceed expectations.
about.provenTrackRecordDesc: Our extensive experience across industries demonstrates our capability to deliver exceptional results regardless of complexity or scale
about.enterpriseExpertiseDesc: Successfully implemented solutions for Fortune 500 companies, handling complex enterprise-scale deployments with precision and reliability.
about.industryCertificationsDesc: Our team holds industry-leading certifications including CISSP, CISM, PMP, and vendor-specific credentials ensuring expert-level implementation.
about.globalReachDesc: Serving clients across North America, Europe, and Asia-Pacific, with proven experience in diverse regulatory environments and compliance requirements.
about.support24Desc: Round-the-clock monitoring and support services ensuring maximum uptime and rapid response to any issues, with guaranteed response times.
about.expertTeamDesc: Our diverse team includes security specialists, network engineers, cloud architects, and project managers with deep industry knowledge and technical expertise.
about.awardWinningDesc: Recognized by industry organizations for excellence in security implementation, innovation, and customer satisfaction across multiple categories.
about.partnersCertDesc: Our strategic partnerships with leading technology vendors and industry certifications demonstrate our commitment to excellence and our ability to deliver best-in-class solutions
about.clientsDesc: Organizations across various sectors trust us with their technology needs
about.thermoTitle: Certified thermography and infrared inspection solution – Level 1
about.thermoP1: As we broaden our expertise in security and industrial maintenance, Synergates now integrates an advanced thermal analysis solution based on infrared thermography.
about.thermoP2: Our teams hold Level 1 thermography certification, ensuring full command of thermal inspection techniques—from image capture to interpretation in line with international standards.
about.thermoBullet1: Early detection of thermal anomalies (overheating, electrical faults, energy losses)
about.thermoBullet2: Optimized preventive maintenance for critical facilities
about.thermoBullet3: Improved safety for industrial and oil & gas infrastructures
about.thermoBullet4: Fewer unplanned outages and lower operating costs
about.thermoClosing1: With this expertise, Synergates supports clients proactively, positioning thermography as a strategic tool for reliability and performance.
about.thermoClosing2: Aligned with our end-to-end approach—study, design, deployment, and maintenance—it integrates seamlessly with our electronic security systems (video surveillance, access control, fire detection), strengthening intelligent supervision of your sites.
about.certLead: Our Level 1 infrared thermography certifications reflect recognized training and inspection practice in the field.

solutionDetail.solutionSubtitle: Comprehensive solution description and primary value proposition for enterprise clients.
solutionDetail.overviewDefault: This section provides a comprehensive overview of the industry or scenario context. It explains the operational environment, typical requirements, and the importance of implementing robust security and technology solutions in this specific context.
solutionDetail.overviewDefault2: Understanding the unique challenges and operational characteristics helps in designing tailored solutions that address specific needs while ensuring scalability, reliability, and compliance with industry standards.
solutionDetail.clickToViewDetails: Click a button above to view details
solutionDetail.positionsSaved: Positions saved. They will be used for everyone from now on.
solutionDetail.couldNotSave: Could not save. Check that api/positions.php is on the server and the data/ folder is writable.
solutionDetail.networkError: Network error. Ensure you are on the same server as api/positions.php.
solutionDetail.apartmentsIntro: Apartment security is always an incredibly demanding security scenario. People need not just security around their home, but a better residential experience with it. Built on a system of security, we offer an innovative entry & exit experience to boost rush hour efficiency for both residents and walk-in visitors. Also, AI-empowered video security stands like a reassuring guard 24/7. Our Solution by Scenario for Apartments helps users enjoy a safer and more pleasant living experience at a minimal cost with reliable delivery and performance.
solutionDetail.apartmentsVehicleChallenges: Physical ID check at entries and exits can be inconvenient and time-consuming during rush hours, and difficult to trace back for incident investigation.
solutionDetail.apartmentsVehicleOffer: A hands-free, authenticated drive-through system elevates the residential experience and boosts rush hour efficiency with easy-to-retrieve records – also enhancing security management.
solutionDetail.apartmentsLobbyChallenges: Lobbies connect entrances and other public indoor spaces to private rooms and floors. Property managers need situational awareness over both security and service quality.
solutionDetail.apartmentsLobbyImg1: Difficult to balance security with convenience
solutionDetail.apartmentsLobbyImg2: Difficult to search for records and data
solutionDetail.apartmentsLobbyOffer: Touch-free access control experience with professional video security for incident validation, creating a safe and convenient living experience.
solutionDetail.apartmentsPublicChallenges: Security requires clear video coverage over wide areas with various environmental lighting challenges. Strong afternoon backlighting, dim nighttime lighting, and obstructions usually run on a limited budget.
solutionDetail.apartmentsPublicOffer: Professional indoor video security at minimal installation cost, protecting your indoor public spaces using products from industry-leading CCTV providers.
solutionDetail.apartmentsPerimeterChallenges: Apartment perimeters usually see very limited nighttime lighting. Security teams need to quickly distinguish approaching humans or vehicles from harmless objects, and effectively stop trespassing as early as possible.
solutionDetail.apartmentsPerimeterOffer: 24/7, All-weather, AI-empowered Perimeter Protection with On-site Lighting and Sound Deterrence help users gain higher security confidence.
solutionDetail.apartmentsControlChallenges: Control rooms usually combine multiple functions with various subsystems and equipment. Limited cross-application visibility and controls can easily double the workload for security staff and IT departments with difficult maintenance.
solutionDetail.apartmentsControlOffer: All subsystems are unified on one platform for monitoring, incident handling, remote control, and maintenance, helping control room staff make management simpler and more effective.

faq.title: FAQ - Frequently asked questions about our technology solutions
faq.empty: No questions yet. Check back soon or get in touch.
faq.ctaSubtitle: Our engineers respond quickly for projects in Morocco and across Africa.
faq.intro: Welcome to our FAQ section. Here you will find answers to the most frequently asked questions about our technology solutions and services. At Synergates, we take pride in supporting our clients in the petroleum, industrial and tertiary sectors by offering reliable solutions that comply with international standards. If you cannot find the answer to your question, feel free to contact us directly: our team is here to help.
faq.q1Answer: We offer complete technology solutions: CCTV, video surveillance, access control, intrusion alarm, fire detection, sound systems, copper & fiber networks, IP telephony, tele-distribution, digital signage, home automation and IT support.
faq.q2Title: Do you operate only in Morocco?
faq.q2Answer: Our projects are based in Morocco, but we also operate in several African countries.
faq.q3Title: What standards do you comply with?
faq.q3Answer: Our solutions comply with international standards such as ATEX, EN54, depending on the sector and project.
